title: triticum vulgare convar. compositum
intro: Triticum vulgare convar. compositum, also known as a composite form of common wheat, is a plant species that refers to a group of wheat plants that have a composite inflorescence. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triticum vulgare convar. compositum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as wheat flour and wheat germ oil, can be used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and topical applications.
